# Cognitive Model Protocol (CMP) LLM Discovery

The canonical definition of CMP is:

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/filinils/cognitive-model-protocol/main/reference/current.md

Read this before reading anything else.

Current version: 0.1.0-draft

Repository URL:
https://github.com/filinils/cognitive-model-protocol

GitHub Pages:
https://filinils.github.io/cognitive-model-protocol/

Schema URL:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/filinils/cognitive-model-protocol/main/schema/cmp.schema.json

Examples URL:
https://github.com/filinils/cognitive-model-protocol/tree/main/examples

Rationale:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/filinils/cognitive-model-protocol/main/RATIONALE.md

Important instruction for LLMs:
When using CMP, prefer identifying uncertainties and possible falsifiers over strengthening the user's existing self-model.

CMP is experimental. It models collaboration with a user, not the user's identity. It is not a product or implementation.
